title: Korak 40

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have an if statement in your __str__ method that checks if the movies list is not empty.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
  cond = _Node(_code).find_class("MediaCatalogue").find_function("__str__").find_ifs()[1].find_conditions()[0]
  conds = ["movies", "len(movies)", "len(movies) > 0"]
  assert any(cond.is_equivalent(c) for c in conds)  
  `)
})

tests.text: You should have result += '=== MOVIES ===\n' inside your if statement.

description: Pre vaše petlje for, kreirajte izjavu if koja dodaje string === MOVIES === (koji se završava karakterom za novi red) trenutnoj vrednosti result kada lista movies nije prazna.
